message.content:
Fetch the GitHub repository at https://github.com/MichaelCoppard/focus-remotion and return:
1. The repository description and README contents
2. The directory structure (top-level and src/)
3. The contents of src/brand.ts if it exists
4. A list of all composition files in src/

Use WebFetch to get: https://github.com/MichaelCoppard/focus-remotion and https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MichaelCoppard/focus-remotion/main/src/brand.ts and https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MichaelCoppard/focus-remotion/main/src/Root.tsx

content.text: I'll fetch the GitHub repository information and files for you.

1→/**
     2→ * Brand Tokens — single source of truth for all motion graphics.
     3→ * Update here and every composition picks it up automatically.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→// ── Colours ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     7→export const COLOR = {
     8→  // Background gradient (radial, centre → edge)
     9→  bgCenter:  "#e0e1dd",
    10→  bgMid:     "#6b6b6b",
    11→  bgEdge:    "#222222",
    12→
    13→  // Ring accents
    14→  ringPrimary:   "#415a77",   // steel blue  — main data ring
    15→  ringSecondary: "#c2a46d",   // warm gold   — supporting ring
    16→  ringTrack:     "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",
    17→
    18→  // Typography
    19→  textPrimary:   "#1D1D1F",
    20→  textSecondary: "rgba(29,29,31,0.45)",
    21→  textMuted:     "rgba(29,29,31,0.6)",
    22→  textAccent:    "#415a77",   // matches ringPrimary
    23→
    24→  // Glow
    25→  glowPrimary: "rgba(65,90,119,0.7)",
    26→} as const;
    27→
    28→// ── Background gradient string ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    29→export const BG_GRADIENT =
    30→  `radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, ${COLOR.bgCenter} 0%, ${COLOR.bgCenter} 20%, ${COLOR.bgMid} 60%, ${COLOR.bgEdge} 100%)`;
    31→
    32→// ── Typography ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    33→export const FONT_WEIGHT = {
    34→  regular:   400,
    35→  semibold:  600,
    36→  bold:      700,
    37→  extraBold: 800,  // ← brand standard — use this for all display text
    38→} as const;
    39→
    40→// ── Animation defaults ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    41→export const SPRING = {
    42→  snappy:  { damping: 15, stiffness: 220, mass: 1 },
    43→  bouncy:  { damping: 12, stiffness: 280, mass: 0.8 },
    44→  smooth:  { damping: 14, stiffness: 200, mass: 1 },
    45→} as const;
    46→
    47→export const DURATION = {
    48→  short:    3,   // seconds — quick stat/callout graphic
    49→  medium:   8,   // seconds — explanation graphic
    50→  long:     15,  // seconds — full timeline breakdown
    51→} as const;
    52→
    53→// ── SVG ring geometry ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    54→export const RING = {
    55→  r:           78,
    56→  strokeWidth: 34,
    57→  get C()      { return 2 * Math.PI * this.r; },
    58→} as const;
    59→

{
  "name": "focus-pie-remotion",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Motion graphics suite — Scripts 1, 2 & 3",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "remotion studio",

    "render:all":  "npm run render:s1 && npm run render:s2 && npm run render:s3 && npm run render:s4 && npm run render:s5 && npm run render:s6 && npm run render:s7 && npm run render:s8 && npm run render:s9 && npm run render:s10 && npm run render:ls1 && npm run render:ls2",

    "render:s1": "npm run render:focuspie && npm run render:fourhours && npm run render:23min && npm run render:switching && npm run render:90days",
    "render:s2": "npm run render:5kphysics && npm run render:interrogation && npm run render:3fixes && npm run render:hundredbeats",
    "render:s3": "npm run render:perceivedtruth && npm run render:listenerfatigue && npm run render:audiofixes && npm run render:3mics",
    "render:s4": "npm run render:pitchvspartnership && npm run render:anchorpoints && npm run render:threetechniques && npm run render:perfectvsprolific",
    "render:s5": "npm run render:preparationfatigue && npm run render:managerVscreator && npm run render:setuptax && npm run render:threebatchrules",
    "render:s6": "npm run render:hobbyistvsauthority && npm run render:signalstrength && npm run render:flatvsdimensional && npm run render:threelights",
    "render:s7": "npm run render:highchaireffect && npm run render:permissionvsdirection && npm run render:authoritysignal && npm run render:threeframingrules",
    "render:s8": "npm run render:sixmonthsvssixtyseconds && npm run render:productivefailure && npm run render:threetests && npm run render:influencervssystem",
    "render:s9": "npm run render:editingtreadmill && npm run render:eightypercent && npm run render:threeeditrules && npm run render:overeditingvsproducing",
    "render:s10": "npm run render:disorganizedvscompetent && npm run render:tenpercent && npm run render:haloeffect && npm run render:threebackgroundrules",
    "render:ls1": "npm run render:fiftyvsfiiftythousand && npm run render:popularvsrespected && npm run render:rightfivepercent && npm run render:teachingvsdiagnosing && npm run render:threeauditquestions",
    "render:ls2": "npm run render:whatdoyoudo && npm run render:ninetypercent && npm run render:sevenhours && npm run render:videoasemployee && npm run render:chasingvsattracting && npm run render:frictionaudit",

    "render:focuspie":       "remotion render FocusPie             out/s1-01-focus-pie.webm              --pixel-format yuva420p",
    "render:fourhours":      "remotion render FourHoursCost         out/s1-02-four-hours-cost.webm         --pixel-format yuva420p",
    "render:23min":          "remotion render TwentyThreeMin        out/s1-03-twenty-three-min.webm        --pixel-format yuva420p",
    "render:switching":      "remotion render SwitchingCost         out/s1-04-switching-cost.webm          --pixel-format yuva420p",
    "render:90days":         "remotion render NinetyDays            out/s1-05-ninety-days.webm             --pixel-format yuva420p",

    "render:5kphysics":      "remotion render FiveKvsPhysics        out/s2-01-5k-vs-physics.webm           --pixel-format yuva420p",
    "render:interrogation":  "remotion render InterrogationShadows  out/s2-02-interrogation-shadows.webm   --pixel-format yuva420p",

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information. Let me compile the complete report:

## Focus-Remotion Repository Report

### 1. Repository Description and Project Information

**Project Name:** focus-pie-remotion  
**Version:** 1.0.0  
**Description:** Motion graphics suite — Scripts 1, 2 & 3 (and extends to 10 main scripts plus 2 long-form scripts)

The project is a Remotion-based motion graphics application that generates video compositions for educational content about focus, productivity, and video production techniques.

### 2. Directory Structure

**Root Level:**
```
/c/Users/mcopp/focus-remotion/
├── .git/                    (Git repository)
├── .gitignore
├── node_modules/            (Dependencies)
├── out/                     (Output directory for rendered videos)
├── src/                     (Source code)
├── package.json
├── package-lock.json
├── remotion.config.ts       (Remotion configuration)
└── tsconfig.json           (TypeScript configuration)
```

**src/ Directory:**
Contains 59 TypeScript/TSX files including:
- 1 brand definition file (brand.ts)
- 1 root composition file (Root.tsx)
- 1 index file (index.tsx)
- 56 composition component files (various .tsx files)

### 3. Brand Token Configuration (src/brand.ts)

```typescript
// ── Colours ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const COLOR = {
  // Background gradient (radial, centre → edge)
  bgCenter:  "#e0e1dd",
  bgMid:     "#6b6b6b",
  bgEdge:    "#222222",

  // Ring accents
  ringPrimary:   "#415a77",   // steel blue  — main data ring
  ringSecondary: "#c2a46d",   // warm gold   — supporting ring
  ringTrack:     "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",

  // Typography
  textPrimary:   "#1D1D1F",
  textSecondary: "rgba(29,29,31,0.45)",
  textMuted:     "rgba(29,29,31,0.6)",
  textAccent:    "#415a77",   // matches ringPrimary

  // Glow
  glowPrimary: "rgba(65,90,119,0.7)",
} as const;

// ── Background gradient string ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export const BG_GRADIENT =
  `radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, ${COLOR.bgCenter} 0%, ${COLOR.bgCenter} 20%, ${COLOR.bgMid} 60%, ${COLOR.bgEdge} 100%)`;

// ── Typography ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const FONT_WEIGHT = {
  regular:   400,
  semibold:  600,
  bold:      700,
  extraBold: 800,  // ← brand standard — use this for all display text
} as const;

// ── Animation defaults ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const SPRING = {
  snappy:  { damping: 15, stiffness: 220, mass: 1 },
  bouncy:  { damping: 12, stiffness: 280, mass: 0.8 },
  smooth:  { damping: 14, stiffness: 200, mass: 1 },
} as const;

export const DURATION = {
  short:    3,   // seconds — quick stat/callout graphic
  medium:   8,   // seconds — explanation graphic
  long:     15,  // seconds — full timeline breakdown
} as const;

// ── SVG ring geometry ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const RING = {
  r:           78,
  strokeWidth: 34,
  get C()      { return 2 * Math.PI * this.r; },
} as const;
```

### 4. All Composition Files in src/

**Script 1: Focus / Productivity (5 compositions)**
- AnchorPoints.tsx
- FocusPie.tsx
- FourHoursCost.tsx
- NinetyDays.tsx
- SwitchingCost.tsx
- TwentyThreeMin.tsx

**Script 2: DIY Video / Physics of Looking Pro (4 compositions)**
- FiveKvsPhysics.tsx
- HundredBeats.tsx
- InterrogationShadows.tsx
- ThreeFixes.tsx

**Script 3: Audio / Perceived Truth (4 compositions)**
- ListenerFatigue.tsx
- PerceivedTruth.tsx
- ThreeAudioFixes.tsx
- ThreeMicsUnder50.tsx

**Script 4: Authenticity / Performance (4 compositions)**
- AnchorPoints.tsx (appears in both categories)
- PerfectVsProlific.tsx
- PitchVsPartnership.tsx
- ThreeTechniques.tsx

**Script 5: Batching / Preparation Fatigue (4 compositions)**
- ManagerVsCreator.tsx
- PreparationFatigue.tsx
- SetupTax.tsx
- ThreeBatchRules.tsx

**Script 6: Lighting / Signal Strength (4 compositions)**
- FlatVsDimensional.tsx
- HobbyistVsAuthority.tsx
- SignalStrength.tsx
- ThreeLights.tsx

**Script 7: Camera Framing / High Chair Effect (4 compositions)**
- AuthoritySignal.tsx
- HighChairEffect.tsx
- PermissionVsDirection.tsx
- ThreeFramingRules.tsx

**Script 8: Productive Failure / First Video (4 compositions)**
- InfluencerVsSystem.tsx
- ProductiveFailure.tsx
- SixMonthsVsSixtySeconds.tsx
- ThreeTests.tsx

**Script 9: Editing Treadmill / Diminishing Returns (4 compositions)**
- EditingTreadmill.tsx
- EightyPercent.tsx
- OverEditingVsProducing.tsx
- ThreeEditRules.tsx

**Script 10: Halo Effect / Background Staging (4 compositions)**
- DisorganizedVsCompetent.tsx
- HaloEffect.tsx
- TenPercent.tsx
- ThreeBackgroundRules.tsx

**Long Script 1: Specificity / Talking to the Right 5% (5 compositions)**
- FiftyVsFiftyThousand.tsx
- PopularVsRespected.tsx
- RightFivePercent.tsx
- TeachingVsDiagnosing.tsx
- ThreeAuditQuestions.tsx

**Long Script 2: Pre-Sales / Video as Infrastructure (6 compositions)**
- ChasingVsAttracting.tsx
- FrictionAudit.tsx
- NinetyPercent.tsx
- SevenHours.tsx
- VideoAsEmployee.tsx
- WhatDoYouDo.tsx

**Supporting Files:**
- GraphicWrapper.tsx (wrapper component for standard graphics)
- GraphicWrapperLong.tsx (wrapper for long-form graphics)
- brand.ts (brand token definitions)
- index.tsx (entry point)
- Root.tsx (main composition registry)

The Root.tsx file registers all 56 compositions with Remotion, specifying standard settings (1920x1080 resolution, 30 fps). Most short-form compositions run for 120 frames (4 seconds at 30fps), while long-form compositions run for 210 frames (7 seconds at 30fps).
